leadText: The Pink Cup (Japanese: ピンクカップ Pink Cup) is a type of picnic item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Pink Cup serves no practical purpose other than to decorate the player 's picnic.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A cup sold with the Pink Bottle. The two don't stack, so they're tough to pack—but they look good, so they're popular with those who like to post picnic photos.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price S V $ 1,500 $ 375 Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Pink Cup serves no practical purpose other than to decorate the player 's picnic. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A cup sold with the Pink Bottle. The two don't stack, so they're tough to pack—but they look good, so they're popular with those who like to post picnic photos. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods S V Picnic-Knacks ( Cascarrafa Branch)
